title: Enums Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 2 — populated enum-family schema for the SP Project Control Center machine-readable Project Site Template Contract. Defines the canonical enum sets used across all other families: ProjectType, ProjectStage, ProjectStatus, DecisionClosureStatus (the four-value mvp_status taxonomy), SiteHealthSeverity, RepairAutomationTier, EnforcementLayer, and ValidationRuleCategory. Anti-regression tokens (`preconstruction_only`, `warranty_closeout`, `Archived`-as-Stage, `active_construction`-as-Type) appear only inside `forbiddenValues` arrays, never as valid enum members. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §3.2, §4B.0, §4B.1, §19, §19A, §22.

enumSets.description: Container for enum-set instances at runtime. Schema is open in this step; per-set validation populates as later Phase 1 steps consume the canonical sets defined in canonicalEnumSets.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Decision Closure Register status — the canonical four-value mvp_status enum bound by Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and VR-24.

ProjectType.name: ProjectType
ProjectType.description: Project type vertical. Selected at site creation; influences seeding and module visibility.
ProjectType.source: Standard Project Site Template Contract §4B.1; D-12 closure
ProjectType.notes: `active_construction` is forbidden only as ProjectType; it is valid as ProjectStage. `preconstruction_only` and `warranty_closeout` are deprecated tokens; never valid as active values.

ProjectStage.name: ProjectStage
ProjectStage.description: Lifecycle stage of the project. Drives module visibility and access manager bindings.
ProjectStage.notes: `Archived` is forbidden as ProjectStage; it is valid as ProjectStatus.

ProjectStatus.name: ProjectStatus
ProjectStatus.description: Operational status of the site. Drives archive behavior, read-only flips, and rename rules.
ProjectStatus.notes: Status `Archived` triggers site rename, library read-only flip, and metadata freeze (VR-09).

DecisionClosureStatus.name: DecisionClosureStatus
DecisionClosureStatus.description: Decision Closure Register status — the canonical four-value mvp_status enum. All family schemas SHOULD bind their `mvp_status` field to this enum; scaffold-local shorthand introduced in Phase 1 Step 1 is being reconciled progressively as families are populated.
DecisionClosureStatus.source: Standard Project Site Template Contract §22; Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy (Required Common Fields); VR-24
DecisionClosureStatus.notes: Scaffold-local shorthand (`mvp`, `deferred`, `placeholder`) appearing in the 12 untouched family skeletons is temporary. Mapping: `mvp → Frozen for MVP`; `deferred → Deferred`; `placeholder → Proof-Gated` or `Deferred` per per-family extraction. Final binding to this canonical enum is performed when each family is populated in Phase 1 Step 3 / Step 4.

SiteHealthSeverity.name: SiteHealthSeverity
SiteHealthSeverity.description: Severity classification for Site Health drift records.

RepairAutomationTier.name: RepairAutomationTier
RepairAutomationTier.description: Repair Automation tier for Site Health repair actions.

EnforcementLayer.name: EnforcementLayer
EnforcementLayer.description: Layer at which a validation rule is enforced. Cross-Layer means multiple layers participate; participating layers are recorded per-rule.
EnforcementLayer.source: Phase 0 Step 2 Validation Rule Table Plan; Standard Project Site Template Contract §22
EnforcementLayer.notes: JSON Schema alone cannot enforce runtime behavior; cross-layer rules (e.g., SPFx must not call Procore directly) are enforced by SPFx code review, backend routing, and documented governance.

ValidationRuleCategory.name: ValidationRuleCategory
ValidationRuleCategory.description: Classification of validation rules by category.
ValidationRuleCategory.source: Phase 0 Step 2 Validation Rule Table Plan
